# Lucide icon codepoints — auto-generated from Lucide.ttf
# Format: hex_codepoint  glyph-name
#
# Usage in Rust:  iced::widget::text("\u{XXXX}").font(LUCIDE_FONT)

//! Lucide icon helpers.
//!
//! **Adding a new icon:** look up the codepoint in
//! `crates/playfair-core/assets/fonts/lucide-codepoints.txt`,
//! then follow the pattern of any existing function below.
